title: Restock Your First Aid Kit
description: Replace used supplies so you're ready for emergencies.

dialogue.text: After a few busy projects some of your first aid supplies are running low. Let's get that kit restocked so you're prepared.
Pick up fresh bandages, gauze and antiseptic wipes. Swap out anything that's expired so the kit stays reliable.
Perfect! Keeping your kit stocked means small injuries won't slow you down.
